title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi goes to the Kali temple to seek inspiration and strength as he tries to find ways to get closer to Tanu. Seeing Tanu alone, Pawan takes advantage of the situation and questions her attempts to call Rishi while reminding her of her obligations.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Neha catches Pawan and Saloni in each other's arms and figures out their affair. Later, the family is shocked to see Rishi and Manpreet injured. While Rishi tells them that Pawan is responsible for their injuries, will he expose Pawan's dirty secret?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi and Tanvi grow closer to each other after his accident, and Manpreet uses this as a chance to tease them. Later, while playing 'passing the parcel,' Rishi picks up Pawan to dance with him. While dancing, Pawan falls down.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi professes his love to Tanu during a power outage, but Pawan catches them. Soon, a quarrel between Rishi and Pawan turns into a brawl and stops only when Saloni intervenes. The next day, Rishi's proposition puts Tanvi in a difficult position.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi professes his love to Tanu during a power outage, but Pawan catches them. Soon, a quarrel between Rishi and Pawan turns into a brawl and stops only when Saloni intervenes. The next day, Rishi's proposition puts Tanvi in a difficult position.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Neha's mother swaps the 'Kundalis' of Tanu and Rishi in order to fulfill her plan of getting Neha married to him. She even spills tea on the pandit when the real 'Kundalis' are about to be read. Meanwhile, Rishi tries desperately to win Tanu over.

title: Kasam
subTitle: When Rishi brings up his doubts regarding his marriage to Neha, his father tries to convince him and cites the 'Kundali' match, stating that to be crucial. Later, Pawan is seeing calling an assassin. Who does he want dead?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Pawan tries to get Shambu, a gangster, to kill Rishi when Saloni suggests a plan more devious. Later, they celebrate their anniversary. Meanwhile, Rishi's apology makes Tanvi realise the curse that she was told about as a child.

title: Balika Vadhu - Kacchi Umar Ke Pakke Rishte
subTitle: Anandi, a child bride, married into an affluent family at a tender age, struggles to cope with the traditions. Soon, she overcomes multiple personal obstacles to emerge as an example for rural women.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Anandi gives her statement in court and reveals the truth about Sanchi's suicide attempt. Sanchi and her family accuse her of supporting Jagdish. Anandi reveals her conversation with Payal, Sanchi's friend and Sanchi yells at Anandi.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Shiv arrives with Payal and discloses Sanchi's plans. Ganga then reveals an audio recording in front of everyone leaving Sanchi helpless. Later, in court, the judge asks Sanchi to pay a fine and revokes all the accusations against Jagdish.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Iravati and Premkishor apologize to Daadisa and Jagdish for Sanchi's mistakes. Later, Jagdish tells Sanchi to forget the past and take Anandi as an inspiration in her life. Meanwhile, Gehna is worried about the judgement of the court.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Sumitra is skeptical about accepting Ganga as she is the mother of Ratan's child. Anandi tells Sumitra about the love that Jagdish and Ganga share. Later, Sumitra accepts Ganga when Jagdish asks for permission to leave the house.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Iravati apologizes to Anandi for her behaviour towards Anandi and her family. Meanwhile, Basant is worried about Jagdish and Ganga. Later, the new couple enters the house and Sumitra gets Jagdish and Ganga to perform rituals.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Sanchi apologizes to her family and asks for forgiveness. When Anandi sees everyone indifferent to Sanchi's apology, she insists that they forgive her. Meanwhile, Dadisa is overwhelmed and blesses Jagdish and Ganga.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish and Ganga celebrate their suhag raat. Jagdish tells her that he is fortunate to have her. Ganga tells Jagdish that she wants him as her husband in all her seven lives. The next morning, Jagdish pulls her into bed when she tries to wake him.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Anandi and Shiv finish all their Diwali shopping, putting up their best efforts to cheer up the family. However, Sanchi seems annoyed with Anandi. Meanwhile, Sumitra is happy with Ganga as her daughter-in-law and both families celebrate Diwali.
